#  Manage Lien Waivers on Project Invoices 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
#####  Procore Pay Integrates with the Modernized Subcontractor Invoicing Experience
in Procore Pay, lien wavers are powered by Levelset, a Procore Company. To manage lien waivers with the Invoice Management tools in Procore, your Procore users must be using the modernized subcontractor invoicing experience.
### What do you want to do?
When using Procore Pay to send payments powered by Goldman Sachs TxB, [invoice administrators](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-administrators) and your payee's [invoice contacts](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-an-invoice-contact) can perform these tasks when managing [lien waivers](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/about-lien-waivers) on [subcontractor invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms).
#####  Tip
**Do you want to also collect signed lien waivers from your payee's sub-tier subcontractors?** To learn how to manage [sub-tier subcontractor](https://support.procore.com/products/online/user-guide/company-level/payments/glossary) information and how to require payees to upload signed sub-tier lien waivers in their invoices, see [Manage Sub-Tier Waivers](https://support.procore.com/products/online/procore-pay/tutorials/manage-sub-tier-waivers).
#### For Invoice Administrators
[Enable & Set Defaults:](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-templates-on-projects)
[Generate Lien Waivers:](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/generate-lien-waivers)
[Regenerate Lien Waivers:](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/regenerate-lien-waivers)
[Preview Lien Waivers:](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/preview-lien-waivers)
[Send Unlock Request:](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/request-to-unlock-signed-unconditional-waivers)
[Compile Invoice Backups:](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/compile-subcontractor-invoice-backups-with-the-invoicing-tool)
#### For Invoice Contacts
[Sign Lien Waivers:](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/sign-lien-waivers)
[View Lien Waivers:](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/view-signed-lien-waivers-on-subcontractor-invoices)
[Unlock a Signed Conditional Lien Waiver:](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/unlock-a-signed-unconditional-lien-waiver-as-an-invoice-contact)
## See Also
  * [View Payment Requirements as an Invoice Administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/view-payment-requirements-as-an-invoice-administrator)
  * [Configure Payment Requirements as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/configure-payment-requirements-as-a-payor)
  * [Enable Sub-Tier Waivers on Subcontractor Invoices as an Invoice Administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/enable-sub-tier-waivers-on-subcontractor-invoices-as-an-invoice-administrator)
title: Manage Lien Waivers on Project Invoices
description: How to manage lien waivers on project invoices in Procore Pay.
